title: leontodon saxatilis subsp. mesorrhynchus
intro: Leontodon saxatilis subsp. mesorrhynchus, also known as Autumn Hawkbit, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Leontodon saxatilis subsp. mesorrhynchus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
